blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,513 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 34.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 16" over the past week. Current depth: 35".
